description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a rectangular plot of green lawn with a black base. The structure features a complex, multi-sectioned roof with both gable and hip elements, and a prominent dark-colored main roof. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral tone, with large windows and glass doors along the longer facade, suggesting a focus on natural light and outdoor views. A covered porch or veranda is visible on one side, providing a sheltered outdoor space. The building's footprint is irregular, with several protruding sections and a clear main entrance area. The overall design is modern with clean lines and a blend of traditional bungalow proportions.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a complex roof, large windows, and a covered porch, set on a green lawn with a black base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main roof, covered porch, and large windows along the longer facade.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and the full width of the porch.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing additional roof sections and the extension of the porch area.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow with fewer windows and a more compact structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and large front-facing windows
